subject: is this actually you?
body:
Hey Justin - Liam here.

I hear this all the time.

I know this AI path works for other people. I have seen it on podcasts. I have read the case studies.

But will it actually work for me?

Fair question.

In the upcoming Masterclass I am hosting, I will show you indisputable proof from two people I have helped on two completely different paths.

One started with no technical background. Did not know Python from a snake.

The other was hands-on but stuck tinkering with YouTube tutorials going absolutely nowhere.

Same outcome: Both made a clear and smooth career transition into AI without guessing what to do next.

In the Masterclass, I will be breaking down how you can do the same no matter your experience.

Here is what we will cover live:

The two proven AI career paths (and which one fits your situation)
How to transition without torching your current income
Real breakdowns (not just success stories but actual tactical moves)
The biggest mistakes people make (and how to avoid them)
A clear roadmap you can follow starting now

If you are serious about change, and want to understand how this can work for you, make sure you are there live.

Liam.
